title: Effect of failure to give new bond
doc_html:
§191.  Effect of failure to give new bond

When the public officer fails or refuses to give a new bond, with good and sufficient surety, within the time prescribed by the court, he shall be ipso facto deprived of his office.
doc_text:
§191.  Effect of failure to give new bond
When the public officer fails or refuses to give a new bond, with good and sufficient surety, within the time prescribed by the court, he shall be ipso facto deprived of his office.
